checks.description: Boundary BCD correction must produce a valid BCD sum and appropriate carry-out without assuming exact cycle latency.
checks.pass_condition: When inputs are stable at a boundary condition, Sum must be within 0-9 and Cout must reflect overflow, and these values must remain stable until the next input change.
checks.trigger_condition: When edge case stimulus applies maximum digit patterns (e.g., A=9, B=9, Cin=1).

checks.pass_condition: Outputs must reflect combinational addition of A, B, Cin with BCD correction, staying within defined ranges, without reliance on hidden state.
checks.trigger_condition: When basic stimulus drives a representative legal input pattern on A, B, and Cin.
